mentions.note: Liquified natural gas; clean energy play with good fundamentals.
LNG liquified natural gas play; energy transition exposure; strong diversification element.

Cleanest, most established pure-play LNG exporter. ~$19.4B of $20B revenue from LNG (2025); two major facilities. Trading ~20x earnings, all-time highs, +45% YTD. Not early to story but direct U.S. LNG supply thesis.
